titleStmt.title: SII 11.189: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 189. (B.K. No. 204 of 1926-27.) NIḌGUNDI, ROṆ TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A STONE INSIDE THE TEMPLE OF BASAVAṆṆA.

summary.p: This inscription is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 31, Vyaya, Śrāvaṇa, puṇṇami, Monday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1106, July 16, Monday, f.d.t. ·92; the eclipse, however, occurred on the following Tuesday. The record states that gifts of gold were made by several persons and the Four Hundred Mahājanas of Niḍugundi for the pavitrārōhaṇa of the god Kēśavādityadēva and for the pārāyaṇa of two Vēdas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramanripavarṣaṁgaḷu 31neya byayasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇada puṇna
me sōmavāradandina sōmagrahaṇanimittaṁ śrīmatkēśavādityadēvada pavitrārō
haṇakke śrīmanniḍuguṁdiyūrūḍeyapramukha mahājana nālnūrvvara sannidhānada
lu muduvoḷala Uḷveyara bammarasa biṭṭa ga 2 nandi yaṇakraviṁtara vāsudēva
kraviṁtaru biṭṭa ga 1 pha 5 dāsayaśaṇangiyara ciddaṇnaṁ biṭṭa ga 1 pa 5
kravintara kīsiyaṇnaṁ biṭṭa ga 1 Antugadya 6 kkaṁ poṁge varṣakkippa
ṇa vriddhiya lnālnūrvvaruṁ śrāvaṇasuddha dvādasigī ponnaṁ biṭṭa dātārara
kayya lhannaraḍu paṇamaṁ koṭṭeraḍuṁ vēdada pārāyaṇama nōdisi
pavitrārōhaṇama nācaṁdrasthāyiyāge naḍasuttaṁ barppa rintī dharmmamaṁ
svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsi prayāge Argghyatīrttha kurukṣē
traṁgaḷalu sāyira kavileyaṁ kōḍuṁkoḷagumaṁ suvarṇnada lkaṭṭisi vēdapāra
garappa brāhmaṇargge koṭṭa phalamakku . I dharmmava nūrvva naḷidava ninitu tīrtthaṁga ḷe lsa
hasravēda brāhmaṇaruma nanitu kavileyuma naḷida ma
hāpātaka nakku .
Digital edition of SII 11.189 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
